title: cymbopogon setifer
intro: Cymbopogon setifer, also known as the needle grass or lemongrass, is a tropical grass species native to India and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic medicine, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Cymbopogon setifer include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and providing relief from fever and respiratory issues. In traditional medicine, Cymbopogon setifer is often prepared as an essential oil, tea, or tincture, and is also used in perfumes and aromatherapy products.
